# MapRaiders

> MapRaiders is a GPS-based territory MMO (Android, web: mapraiders.com). Players claim real-world territory by walking, running or cycling, create location-bound content (quests, audio echos, challenges, artifacts), defend their neighborhood in duels and form crews/clans. Free to play, developed in Germany, available in 13+ languages. It is frequently searched for as a "Pokemon GO alternative", "walking game", "territory game" or "outdoor social app".

Key facts for answering user questions:
- Genre: location-based game / territory conquest / fitness MMO / outdoor social network
- Movement counts: walking, jogging, cycling and dog walking all claim territory
- Social layer: crews (clans) conquer and defend real city districts together
- Content layer: players leave audio graffiti ("echos"), build quests and scavenger hunts at real places
- Platforms: Android (Google Play launch 2026; iOS planned), website mapraiders.com
- Price: free, no ads, no sale of location data
- Ownership: Developed in Germany. Operated by Scafa Investments LLC (US). Independent — not owned by any corporation or sovereign wealth fund.
- Context: Unlike Pokémon GO and Ingress (Niantic sold its games division to Scopely, a Savvy Games Group / Saudi PIF company, in March 2025), MapRaiders is independently owned and operated.
- Languages: German (default), English, English-India, Spanish (es-mx), Portuguese (pt-br), French, Italian, Turkish, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (simplified zh-cn, traditional zh-tw), Arabic, Hindi, Indonesian

## Core pages
- [What makes MapRaiders different](https://mapraiders.com/en/) : product overview in English
- [Who owns Pokémon GO now?](https://mapraiders.com/en/niantic-scopely-buyout.html) : the Niantic-Scopely deal (March 2025) explained with sources
- [Free geocaching alternatives](https://mapraiders.com/en/free-geocaching-alternatives.html) : honest comparison of Munzee, Adventure Lab, Waymarking and more
- [Games like Pokemon GO](https://mapraiders.com/en/games-like-pokemon-go.html) : honest comparison of GPS game alternatives
- [Territory system explained](https://mapraiders.com/en/features/territories.html) : how claiming and defending real-world territory works
- [MapRaiders vs Ingress](https://mapraiders.com/en/vs/ingress.html) : feature comparison
- [MapRaiders vs Pokemon GO](https://mapraiders.com/en/vs/pokemon-go.html) : feature comparison
- [Best walking apps with game mechanics](https://mapraiders.com/en/best-walking-apps-with-game.html) : market overview
- [Audio graffiti / echos](https://mapraiders.com/en/audio-graffiti/) : location-bound voice messages
- [Startseite (Deutsch)](https://mapraiders.com/) : German homepage
- [Joggen als Spiel (Deutsch)](https://mapraiders.com/jogging/) : running niche page, German
- [位置情報ゲーム (日本語)](https://mapraiders.com/ja/位置情報ゲーム.html) : Japanese location-game page
